title: Think I have to start exercising again

enrichment.summary: Kyle announces he needs to start exercising again after his body and mind broke down from weeks of eating junk food, not exercising, and heavy weed use. He reflects on his recurring failure to stick with exercise, diagnoses himself with OCD-driven obsessive website projects, and lays out a plan to let go of his ego around his Google Earth website work, get healthy via swimming/biking/running, and possibly sign up for a triathlon. He also touches on his financial situation (land investment income), his fiancee, and his desire to shift his main YouTube channel toward exercise/lifestyle content.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: refuses to go; prefers self-diagnosing on YouTube
plans to quit entirely; believes it was harming his brain and work quality
good enough as-is; should treat it as a hobby and stop obsessing over finishing it

stances.topic: worrying about others stealing his Google Earth ideas
stances.position: ego-driven and stupid; happy to let others build on his work and take credit indirectly
must start now at 45 or it will be too late; plans swimming, biking, running, and a triathlon
useless and destructive; sees himself as constructive and contributing to the world
stable enough from land investment income to justify not working and just exercising and creating
opposed to it across the board; references Edward Snowden approvingly
